Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Vitamin C plays a vital role in supporting the immune system through multiple mechanisms. As a potent water-soluble antioxidant, it helps neutralize harmful free radicals and protects immune cells from oxidative stress during infections. It is essential for the production, function, and movement of various white blood cells, including neutrophils, lymphocytes, and phagocytes, enhancing their ability to fight pathogens. Vitamin C also promotes the synthesis of collagen, strengthening the skin and mucous membranes as a first line of defense against invaders, and supports the production of antibodies and cytokines that coordinate immune responses. While it won’t necessarily prevent colds in well-nourished people, regular adequate intake (from foods like citrus fruits, berries, peppers, and broccoli, or supplements when needed) can reduce the duration and severity of respiratory infections and help the body recover more effectively. #funny #fyp #me #meme #fypシ

Strawberry Nutella Brownies 🍫💌🍓 So fudgy & perfect for valentines!  (Recipe makes an 8x8 pan) Ingredients: 10 tbsp (140g) unsalted butter, melted 1 cup (200g) granulated sugar ¼ cup (50g) brown sugar, packed  2 eggs, room temp 1 tsp vanilla extract ½ cup + 2 tbsp (56g) unsweetened cocoa powder ½ tsp salt 1 tbsp (13g) vegetable oil ½ cup (63g) all purpose flour, spooned & leveled or weighed (don’t pack it in) ¾ cup chocolate chips/ chunks 190g (~⅔ cup) Nutella  Topping: strawberry slices, patted dry (as many as you want/enough to cover the top) Nutella (to spread over the top and drizzle)  *if the nutella is too thick to drizzle you can melt it slightly in the microwave Instructions: Line an 8x8 pan with parchment paper. Spread the nutella onto the parchment into a thin, even square the size of the pan. Freeze for at least 20-30 minutes. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C) and line/grease an 8x8-inch pan with parchment. In a large bowl, whisk melted butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla, then whisk vigorously for 1-2 minutes to help create a crackly top. Stir in cocoa powder and salt until fully combined. Mix in oil, then gently fold in the flour until just combined (don’t over mix). Fold in chocolate chips/chopped chocolate. Spread half the batter into the greased pan. Place the frozen nutella sheet on top of it. Then, spread the remaining batter over it to cover the nutella layer completely. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick near the center comes out with no wet batter. It should just come out with a little nutella & slightly moist crumbs. Let the brownies cool completely. Spread a thin layer of nutella over the cooled brownies, add the strawberry slices (patted dry) all over the top, and drizzle with more nutella.  Best enjoyed fresh!   #bakingrecipe #fudgybrownies #chocolatestrawberries #nutella #Recipe

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Strawberry phyllo pie 🍓 5 sheets phyllo dough 25 g butter Filling: 300 g cream cheese 2 egg yolks 5 tbsp powdered sugar 2 tbsp cornstarch 300 g strawberries 30 g almond flakes Brush each phyllo sheet with melted butter and place into the baking dish. Mix cream cheese with egg yolks, powdered sugar and cornstarch. Add the cream and strawberries onto the dough, fold the edges, brush with butter and sprinkle with almond flakes. Bake at 170°C top-bottom heat for 35 minutes. Pastel de masa filo con fresas 🍓 5 hojas de masa filo 25 g mantequilla Relleno: 300 g queso crema 2 yemas 5 cdas azúcar glas 2 cdas maicena 300 g fresas 30 g láminas de almendra Pincelar cada hoja de masa filo con mantequilla derretida y colocar en el molde. Mezclar el queso crema con las yemas, azúcar glas y maicena. Colocar la crema y las fresas sobre la masa, cerrar los bordes, pincelar con mantequilla y espolvorear almendra. Hornear a 170°C calor arriba y abajo durante 35 minutos. #phyllodough #strawberrydessert #EasyRecipe #homemadedessert #foodreels

How to prepare for an exam a day before? 📚  - Blurting method  1) Read your textbook 2)Write down as much as you know / can remember 8) Research the areas you missed and write those areas down to revise further. Active recall (SQ3R method): 1) Survey: skim the material 2) Question: write questions. 3) Read: Actively read the material and answer the questions you made. 4) Retrieve: write everything you can remember 5) Review: Repeat to yourself what the point of the material was. Homemade franui with raspberry chocolate 🩷 3-ingredient easy recipe!  Ingredients for 35 franui  35 fresh raspberries 180g white chocolate 160g white chocolate + 20g raspberry chocolate (I used Valrhona framboise inspiration) Instructions Place raspberries on a tray and freeze for about 1 hour. Melt white chocolate over a double boil or in the microwave (low power, you don't want to burn it!) Use a toothpick to dip each raspberry with white chocolate. Shake excess chocolate. Place on a tray and freeze. Meanwhile, melt white + raspberry chocolate (or any other chocolate). Coat each raspberry and place back into the freezer for 30 minutes. Enjoy!! #chocolate #raspberries #franui #dessert #Recipe #viral #healthytreat #raspberry
